ddls:
CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft model */,
  "model" TEXT /* Name of the aircraft model */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft */,
  "fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Fuel efficiency of the aircraft (e.g., miles per gallon) */,
  "climb_rate" REAL /* Climb rate of the aircraft (e.g., feet per minute) */,
  "descent_rate" REAL /* Descent rate of the aircraft (e.g., feet per minute) */,
  "max_altitude" INTEGER /* Maximum altitude of the aircraft (e.g., feet) */,
  "max_speed" INTEGER /* Maximum speed of the aircraft (e.g., miles per hour) */,
  "empty_weight" INTEGER /* Empty weight of the aircraft (e.g., pounds) */,
  "max_takeoff_weight" INTEGER /* Maximum takeoff weight of the aircraft (e.g., pounds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft model used for the flight */,
  "departure_airport" TEXT /* Departure airport */,
  "arrival_airport" TEXT /* Arrival airport */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number */,
  "departure_gate" TEXT /* Departure gate */,
  "arrival_gate" TEXT /* Arrival gate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., GPS, accelerometer) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of last calibration */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the data was collected from */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor used to collect the data */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the data */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was collected */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., good, bad, unknown) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_data_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the forecast is for */,
  "forecast_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the forecast was made */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed */,
  "air_density" REAL /* Air density */,
  "temperature" INTEGER /* Temperature */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prediction_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of prediction model (e.g., machine learning, statistical) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the prediction model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the prediction model */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date of last training */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date of last validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction model used */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the prediction was made for */,
  "prediction_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Value of the prediction */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES prediction_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction the error was detected in */,
  "error_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the error was detected */,
  "error_value" REAL /* Value of the error */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of error (e.g., systematic, random) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_errors_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "error_id" INTEGER /* ID of the error the alert was generated for */,
  "alert_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of the alert (e.g., critical, warning, info) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_error_id FOREIGN KEY ("error_id") REFERENCES errors ("error_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., pilot, air traffic controller) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user accessed the system */,
  "access_action" TEXT /* Action the user performed (e.g., viewed prediction, generated alert) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of the user when accessing the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_trajectory" (
  "trajectory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trajectory */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the trajectory is for */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction the trajectory was generated from */,
  "trajectory_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the trajectory was generated */,
  "int_before" INTEGER /* Integer before the predicted value */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the predicted value */,
  "int_after" INTEGER /* Integer after the predicted value */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the predicted value */,
  "pred_error" INTEGER /* Predicted error of the value */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the trajectory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trajectory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_trajectory_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_trajectory_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Code of the airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_airports" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport */,
  "airport_type" TEXT /* Type of airport (e.g., departure, arrival) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id", "airport_id")
)
